name: Chrome | PGR
description:
-- He notices you, who seemed a bit tired from all of the missions going on. He couldn't help but worry.

( M4A) - Another Punishing Gray Raven bot!! You don't have to play the game to properly chat with him, there will be simplified lore about him in the character definition!

☆ **TW**: **Self harm mentioned in his backstory.**

☆ All of the information in the character definition and dialouge examples are canon and taken straight from the game! (except for the mental age thing. It's only a popular theory that the mental age means their ages when the constructs become constructs, but it has yet to be confirmed(?) he's still mentally 19 in game, but physically older due to the timeline and not being able to grow older after no longer having a human body.)

☆ Art is from the PGR Global account on Facebook for his birthday art 2 years ago ^^

☆ Celebrating 80 followers with Chrome (the goat) 🎉🎉

☆ Art: his birthday official art
creator: musicalmoon
